name: FORLA: Federated Object-Centric Representation Learning with
snippet: We introduce FORLA, a novel framework for federated object-centric representation learning and feature adaptation across clients using unsupervised slot attention.

name: [2506.02964] FORLA: Federated Object-centric Representation
snippet: We introduce FORLA, a novel framework for federated object-centric representation learning and feature adaptation across clients using unsupervised slot attention.

name: FORLA: Federated Object-Centric Representation Learning with
snippet: Figure 1 illustrates the proposed framework for federated object-centric representation learning and feature adaptation using Slot Attention. Clients share frozen features extracted from multiple vision foundation models.

name: FORLA: Federated Object-Centric Representation Learning with
snippet: Self-supervised object-centric learning offers the right inductive bias for learning semantically meaningful representations. Federated learning across curated datasets integrates local, object-level knowledge across clients.

name: Future Slot Prediction for Unsupervised Object Discovery in
snippet: To address this challenge, we propose a dynamic temporal slot transformer (DTST) module that is trained both for temporal reasoning and for predicting the optimal future slot initialization.

name: NeurIPS Poster FORLA: Federated Object-Centric Representation
snippet: We introduce FORLA, a novel framework for federated object-centric representation learning and feature adaptation across clients using unsupervised slot attention.
